headline: Oracle’s Defense AI Win Highlights Government Cloud Role And Valuation Gap
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has been selected by the U.S. Department of Defense as one of eight technology partners to deliver advanced AI tools for classified military networks. The award places Oracle in a small group of major cloud and AI providers trusted with sensitive defense-related AI workloads. The contract is focused on providing AI infrastructure and software to support secure, classified military operations. For investors watching NYSE:ORCL, this development highlights Oracle's role in...
